goal: Deterministic generation of realistic multi-person OpenPose skeletons for Flux / Flux2 workflows using structured pose selection instead of pure text prompting.

initial_issue: Flux / Flux2 produced broken anatomy in multi-person scenes
root_cause: text prompts alone are not geometrically precise enough
LLMs generate linguistically plausible prompts but not physically deterministic layouts
diffusion models struggle with multi-person spatial consistency without pose guidance

ollama.important_realization: Ollama alone cannot reliably enforce anatomy or interactions. Real pose data is required.

important_realization: text descriptions are insufficient for reliable anatomy
spatial instructions help but are not enough
stable generation requires explicit skeletal control
real OpenPose skeletons solve the geometry problem
reference poses are more reliable than generated poses
matching against real poses is superior to heuristic pose synthesis

components.name: PoseRegistry
components.purpose: scans the local OpenPose model folder, groups depth, bone structure, and JSON files, and provides stable pose IDs

components.name: PoseBrowser
components.purpose: local browser for searching poses, showing depth previews, switching to bone structure previews on hover, and copying source JSON

components.name: PoseAttributes
components.purpose: assigns searchable pose attributes from keypoint geometry and filename hints

components.name: PoseMatcher
components.purpose: matches incoming poses against real reference poses using similarity search

components.name: PoseOpenPoseRendererNode
components.purpose: renders PAL/OpenPose keypoint JSON to a ComfyUI IMAGE tensor

components.name: PoseSelectorNode
components.purpose: manual pose selection by ID, category filters, and attributes

components.name: PoseFromStructureNode
components.purpose: converts structured pose intent into real matched poses from the database

components.name: OllamaPoseParserNode
components.purpose: validates and normalizes Ollama JSON output into pose intent JSON

rendering.output: torch image tensor compatible with ComfyUI

important_architecture_decision.reason: Real skeletal constraints are required for stable anatomy and interactions.

pipeline: pose matching against real reference database
